text: For duplicate charges, verify transaction IDs and issue refund within 3 business days.
Escalate to payments risk when fraud indicators are present or customer disputes multiple charges.
For locked accounts, verify identity and send password reset link after successful verification.
For delayed shipments, check carrier scan events and offer replacement if delay exceeds SLA by 5 days.
To check order status, ask the customer for their order number. Look up in OMS and relay current tracking state, estimated delivery date, and carrier name.
Orders may be cancelled within 1 hour of placement if not yet shipped. After shipment, direct customer to return process. Non-cancellable items include personalised goods.
To update payment method, navigate to Account > Payment Methods. Customers can add credit/debit cards, PayPal, or bank accounts. Changes apply to next billing cycle.
Invoices are generated automatically after payment. Customers can download invoices from Account > Order History. For missing invoices, regenerate from admin panel within 24h.
Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days to the original payment method. Partial refunds are available for partially used subscriptions or damaged items.
Shipping address can be changed before order enters 'shipped' status. After shipment, a return-and-reship is required. Verify new address against postal validation.
Account deletion requests require identity verification and a 30-day cooling period. Active subscriptions must be cancelled first. Data is purged per GDPR after cooling period.
Subscriptions can be cancelled anytime. Cancellation fee applies to annual plans cancelled before 6 months. Monthly plans have no fee. Access continues until end of billing period.
For customer complaints, acknowledge the issue, apologise sincerely, and offer a concrete resolution. Escalate to manager if customer requests it or complaint involves safety.
Newsletter preferences are managed under Account > Communication Preferences. Customers can opt-in/out of marketing, product updates, and promotional emails independently.
For login issues: clear browser cache, try incognito mode, reset password. For app crashes: update to latest version, reinstall if needed. Collect device info and OS version for bug reports.
